policyDates.label: Rate Doubling
policyDates.description: Hourly meter rates doubled from $1.25 to $2.50/hr for most of the city's 5,332 metered spaces.

policyDates.label: Extended Hours (PB/Mid-City/Uptown)
policyDates.description: Meter hours extended and expanded to Sundays in Pacific Beach, Mid-City, and Uptown districts.

policyDates.label: Downtown Extended Hours + Petco Zone
policyDates.description: Downtown meters extended to 10 PM and Sundays. Petco Park Special Event Zone activated with $10/hr surge pricing.

policyDates.label: Credit Card Fee
policyDates.description: A $0.35 fee applies to all credit card payments at meters, Park Smarter app, and Text to Pay.
